headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For Southwest Airlines (LUV)
summary: Southwest Airlines’ modeled fair value has moved from US$47.47 to US$44.82, a modest reset that matters if you are tracking upside against current trading levels. This shift lines up with recent Street research, where earlier upgrades and higher targets have given way to more cautious calls as fuel assumptions and industry guidance change. As you read on, you will see how to make sense of these evolving views and what to watch next in the Southwest story. Stay updated as the Fair Value for...
